dragon_steak.title: Craft Dragon Steak (End's Delight — cooked dragon meat in a specific recipe)

void_broth.title: Craft Void Broth (End's Delight — combines dragon breath and End materials)

subtitle.text: You are eating a god's guardian. Season appropriately.

description: End's Delight expands the dragon into a full food system.
Dragon Steak is the baseline — cooked dragon meat processed further.
Void Broth is the dragon's essence in liquid form — dragon breath + End stone materials.
The End is a complete ecosystem if you treat it like one:
- Dragon Breath collected from acid clouds
- Chorus Fruit from the outer islands
- End Stone as a cooking vessel material
Laios's thesis was that to understand a monster,
you must eat it. Not just kill it.
The killing is easy. The cooking requires knowledge.
